scope: One bounded Prize Pack slice using currently accessible evidence only.

target_slice.label: SVE Basic Energies Series 5 Alias-Normalized Window
target_slice.shared_question: Across currently accessible Prize Pack Series 5-8 sources, do these Scarlet & Violet Energies rows appear in exactly one corroborated series once the raw source label is normalized from "SVE Basic Energies" to the canon energy set family?

ready_rows.why_blocked: The row still lacks deterministic series corroboration across the supported Prize Pack coverage window.

evidence_sources.note: Family-only stamped row without independent series proof.
